attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

codes_manifest.display: Embolism and thrombosis of arteries of the upper extremities

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00008, derived from source AUC-008) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-VASC-01 bucket.

Protocol Appendix specialty_tags list (§9.1) differs from the actual schema enum; the schema (authoritative per §7.0) does not include 'OPHTH'/'CARD'-only vascular coding as protocol implied — used the schema's real enum values (VASC, CARD, OPHTHAL, etc., confirmed by validator) rather than the protocol appendix, and flagging this drift as instructed in the protocol's closing note ('if this protocol and a schema disagree, the schema wins — report the drift').

Source note describes in-person palpation of absent pulses and a physical temperature demarcation line; presentation layer de-anchored to video-observable pallor/mottling (patient showing the limb on camera) as the closest telehealth-obtainable equivalent, with pulse/exam findings sealed into 10/11.

Vitals were clinician-measured in person (including irregular HR consistent with AF) and were not placed in 01.objective_data_offered; the patient-reported AF history was used instead as the telehealth-obtainable equivalent.

Oxycodone administered in person was not carried into 12_management_plan_node as patient-directed medication, since opioid analgesia is not appropriate as telehealth-directed self-management and the priority action is emergency escalation, not analgesia.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible older-adult age (71) consistent with AF and 'lives alone' framing was assigned as a conservative placeholder.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
